raw_consumer_statement: We have been traveling and still paid the statement balance in full for months, they have sent a new card to this new address on file, we called to activate and now account is locked, havent used the Citi Thank You Mastercard account in over ( XXXX ) weeks for any purchases, paid off the last statement- XX/XX/XXXX- in full, yet they claim over XXXX is owed yet will not allow us the account statement for all charges only a balance due.
